chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. 99 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Fresh Case. 1. For order on Misc. No. 448/2024 (Exemption) 2. For order on Misc. No. 449/2024 (Stay/App) 3. For hearing of main case. -------------- 24.09.2024. Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, Advocate for Petitioners ---------- Counsel, under instructions, does not press this petition along with pending applications. Order accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
